title: .NET 9.0 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[9.0.111-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[9.0.111-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.111 and Runtime 9.0.10
- Resolves: RHEL-116857
full_text:
[9.0.111-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[9.0.111-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.111 and Runtime 9.0.10
- Resolves: RHEL-116857
